title: Define EmailService with SMTP configuration
description: Create EmailService class in backend/app/core/notifications.py with SMTP configuration based on environment variables.
verification_method: python -c "from app.core.notifications import EmailService; assert hasattr(EmailService, 'smtp_host')"

title: Implement send_email method in EmailService
description: Replace print stub with functional send_email method using smtplib.
verification_method: pytest backend/tests/test_notifications.py

title: Add unit tests for EmailService with mock SMTP
description: Create backend/tests/test_notifications.py and add unit tests using mock SMTP server.
verification_method: pytest backend/tests/test_notifications.py

title: Create SummaryGenerator utility
description: Implement SummaryGenerator in backend/app/core/summaries.py to aggregate data for weekly summaries.
verification_method: python -c "from app.core.summaries import SummaryGenerator; assert SummaryGenerator"

title: Implement generate_weekly_summary for Standard Users
description: Add logic to aggregate tasks due/overdue for individual users.
verification_method: pytest backend/tests/test_summaries.py

title: Implement generate_weekly_summary for Team/Project Owners
description: Add logic for team activity and project health summaries for owners.
verification_method: pytest backend/tests/test_summaries.py

title: Integrate weekly summary scheduler
description: Setup a simple loop or APScheduler task to dispatch summaries on Mondays.
verification_method: Check logs for scheduled task registration

title: Migrate Idea Comments to Universal Threaded System
description: Update ProjectIdeas component to use CommentSection instead of custom legacy comment logic.
verification_method: Manual UI check: Verify threaded replies and Markdown support in Idea details.

title: Deprecate legacy Idea Comments backend
description: Remove redundant IdeaComment model, schema, CRUD, and API endpoints.
verification_method: pytest backend/tests/test_ideas_standalone.py

title: Setup WebSocket Connection Manager
description: Implement a manager class in backend to handle active WebSocket connections by user ID.
verification_method: python -c "from app.core.websockets import ConnectionManager; m = ConnectionManager(); assert m"

title: Broadcast Notifications via WebSockets
description: Update notification CRUD to broadcast new notifications to active WebSocket connections.
verification_method: Manual check: Real-time bell update without refresh.

title: Implement Frontend WebSocket client
description: Connect NotificationPopover to the backend WebSocket endpoint and remove polling logic.
verification_method: Manual UI check: New notifications appear instantly without page refresh or polling.

title: Optimize Mobile Layout & Navigation
description: Improve sidebar responsiveness and table scrolling for mobile devices.
verification_method: Visual check using browser mobile emulation.

title: Universal Search Refinement
description: Add a global search input in the header to find Projects, Tasks, and Ideas.
verification_method: Manual UI check: Searching returns relevant items from all three categories.

title: Fix MCP assign_task tool
description: Implement missing update_assignees method in CRUDTask to support MCP assignment operations.
verification_method: pytest backend/test_mcp_standalone.py

title: Remove AI Decomposer features
description: Delete AI endpoints, schemas, and core services. Remove 'Breakdown' tab from frontend TaskForm.
verification_method: Manual UI check: Breakdown tab removed.

title: Expose Portfolio Health to MCP
description: Add a tool to the MCP server to retrieve portfolio health metrics for AI agents.
verification_method: mcp-inspect tools list

title: Expose Team Workload to MCP
description: Add a tool to the MCP server to retrieve team workload data for AI agents.
verification_method: mcp-inspect tools list

title: Webhook Integration Service
description: Implement a generic webhook dispatcher for Slack and Discord notifications.
verification_method: python -c "from app.core.webhooks import WebhookService; assert WebhookService"

title: Webhook Configuration API & UI
description: Create endpoints and a settings UI to manage personal/project webhook URLs for Slack and Discord.
verification_method: Manual UI check: Save a webhook URL and send a test notification.

title: Resource Workload Leveling Logic
description: Implement backend logic to calculate daily effort per user and detect overallocation based on task durations.
verification_method: pytest backend/tests/test_workload_logic.py

title: Workload Heatmap Widget
description: Add a visualization to the Dashboard showing team member capacity and bottlenecks over the next 30 days.
verification_method: Visual check: Heatmap correctly highlights users with > 8h/day allocated.

title: PDF Generation Service (xhtml2pdf)
description: Implement a service to render HTML templates into professional PDF documents for reports.
verification_method: python -c "from app.core.pdf import PDFService; assert PDFService"

title: Project Status Report Template
description: Create a rich HTML/CSS template for project status reports including Gantt snippets and task lists.
verification_method: Manual check of generated PDF layout.

title: Portfolio Health Aggregation API
description: Implement an endpoint to calculate health scores (ROI, Variance, Risks) across all active projects.
verification_method: pytest backend/tests/test_portfolio_logic.py
